prose:
Fukui reactivity indices of phenol computed with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier "standard", density-fitted)​, gas-phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.  
Geometry: fixed input coordinates from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz (no further optimisation).  
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).  
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill → PySCF backend v (implicit) for the neutral, cationic (charge +1, multiplicity 2) and anionic (charge –1, multiplicity 2) single-point calculations; Mulliken charges used.  
SCFs for all three charge states converged; chemkit integrity check status ok (trustworthy = true).  
Live engine log was written during the run (e.g. opt_…/fukui_<timestamp>.out) — available on request for inspection.
